title: Warm up
content: Three images depict taxi driver perspectives from inside vehicles in three different Chinese cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each scene shows unique urban landscapes and driving contexts, introducing the theme of urban development across China.
key_claims: Beijing scene shows modern highway traffic with traditional architecture and city skyline in background
Chongqing scene shows a driver reading with mountainous terrain and cable car visible
Hangzhou scene shows a driver interacting with a smartphone/AI technology near a lake and green hills

title: An Evolving Nation: A Ride Through China
content: This title slide introduces the presentation's theme of exploring China's development through a journey format. Images include a taxi sign and iconic architecture representing different Chinese cities.
key_claims: Presentation subtitle is 'A Ride Through China'
Visual imagery includes taxi signage and traditional Chinese architecture

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain! Investigate and research
content: This slide outlines a three-step framework for investigating city development in the session. The process flows from identifying local features to development strategies and finally to outcomes and positive impact.
key_claims: Framework consists of three sequential steps: Local Features, Development Strategies, Outcomes & Positive Impact
An isometric city illustration represents the urban development context

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide presents a matching exercise linking three Chinese cities (Beijing, Chongqing, Hangzhou) to their respective development strategies. Lines connect each city to a strategy, though the connections appear crossed/mismatched in the visual.
key_claims: Beijing is associated with Sustainable urban development (per the drawn line)
Chongqing is associated with Tourism & Economic growth (per the drawn line)
Hangzhou is associated with Technology & tradition integration (per the drawn line)

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: This slide summarizes the correct city-strategy associations using taxi driver imagery, correcting the previous matching exercise. It concludes with the overarching theme that China is an evolving nation where each city tailors development strategies to its local characteristics.
key_claims: Beijing's strategy is sustainable urban development
Chongqing's strategy is tourism & economic growth
Hangzhou's strategy is technology & tradition integration
Each city develops strategies based on local features to promote city development (因地制宜)
